scripts.format: npm run format --prefix frontend && npm run format --prefix zero-query
scripts.format:fix: npm run format:fix --prefix frontend && npm run format:fix --prefix zero-query
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix zero-query
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix frontend && npm run lint:fix --prefix zero-query
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix frontend && npm run type-check --prefix zero-query
scripts.check: npm run check --prefix frontend && npm run check --prefix zero-query
